channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NFL's wild-card round averages 28.3 million viewers, a 9.3% decline from last year
item.description: Viewer audiences for the first weekend of the NFL playoffs were down 9.3% from last year, a bigger decline than what the league experienced during the regular season.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Olympics president says he is not communicating with Trump as wildfires threaten 2028 LA Games
item.description: IOC President Thomas Bach says he is not communicating with President-elect Trump as the California wildfires rage on in the host city of the 2028 Games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox announce 16 signings in 2025 international class
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to terms with 16 international players, including two ranked in the Top 100 available prospects, Alejandro Cruz and Orlando Patiño, and other prospects with potential.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Urban Meyer joins Nick Saban in College Football HOF's Class of 2025; Vick, Strahan also elected
item.description: Urban Meyer will join Nick Saban in the 2025 College Football Hall of Fame class, and Michael Vick and Michael Strahan are among the former players who will be inducted.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Republican to propose resolution calling on NCAA to ban trans athletes from women's sports
item.description: Rep. Greg Steube, R-Fla. already has plans to introduce a resolution to further tackle the issue of trans athletes in women's sports after introducing a bill.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas star Quinn Ewers declares for NFL Draft
item.description: Texas Longhorns star quarterback Quinn Ewers declared for the NFL Draft on Wednesday. He passed for more than 3,400 yards and 31 touchdown passes in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas QB Quinn Ewers declares for NFL draft as program ushers in Arch Manning era
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas junior quarterback Quinn Ewers declared for the NFL draft on Wednesday, ending a Longhorns career in which he led the program to a Big 12 championship and twice to the College Football Playoff but was not always embraced by a fan base eagerly waiting for Arch Manning to ta
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rams' Tyler Higbee was spitting up blood after leaving playoff game with injury, coach Sean McVay says
item.description: Los Angeles Rams tight end Tyler Higbee was "spitting up a little bit of blood" as he was hospitalized after leaving the team's playoff game, Sean McVay said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ty Allred's insane buzzer-beater lifts CMU over Western Colorado
item.description:
Despite great defense from the Mountaineer defender, Allred stepped back and threw up a prayer for the win.
His prayer was answered.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Montreal skates past Utah Hockey Club, 5-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's season-long 7-game homestand is not going well. Utah lose for the third time in four games at the Delta Center, falling to the Montreal Canadians Tuesday night, 5-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU bounces back with 85-69 win over Oklahoma State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team snapped a three-game losing skid with an 85-69 win over Oklahoma State Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Beck hopes to bring big play ability to Utes offense
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - When Kyle Whittingham called former BYU quarterback Jason Beck about becoming the Utes new offensive coordinator, Beck jumped at the chance. "When I hit that time of year and had some opportunities come up, and and Coach Witt came calling," Beck said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montréal Canadiens hockey player Emil Heineman will be sidelined for several weeks after he was struck by a car in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: WATCH: Girls basketball coach accused of hitting person with car after argument
item.description: A girls' youth basketball coach is accused of hitting a person with his vehicle after an argument following a game Saturday in Columbia, according to state police, and it was caught on surveillance video.
item.dc:creator: Jenn Brink, Fox 5

item.title: Young Broncos should be proud of 10-win season
item.description: No one will ever be thrilled about losing a playoff game by 24 points, and the Broncos certainly aren't, but it's incredible how greatly Denver exceeded expectations this season.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: The Athletic's Dianna Russini provides a look inside the Bears search for their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have requested interviews with 19 candidates for their next head coach, including Mike McCarthy, Thomas Brown, Ron Rivera, Ben Johnson, Todd Monken, and Steve Sarkisian, while the ambiguity around Ryan Poles' contract situation may make it more difficult for the Bears to hire their
item.dc:creator: Jarrett Payton, WGN 9

item.title: Rams host wild-card playoff game nearly 400 miles east of LA because of wildfires
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams made themselves at home on Monday night for their NFL wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings — even if their adopted stadium featured an unusual amount of red and was nearly 400 miles east of their regular venue.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes welcome third child
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes and his wife Brittany Mahomes have had a busy bye week
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, Fox 5

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as Dallas Cowboys coach, AP source says
item.description: Mike McCarthy is not returning as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Coaching Tracker: The Bears' search to find their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have assembled a six-person panel to find their next head coach, with Ryan Poles as the final decision-maker, and have requested to interview Joe Brady, Thomas Brown, Matt Campbell, Pete Carroll, Brian Flores, Marcus Freeman, Aaron Glenn, Joe Brady, and David Shaw.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC loses on late goal to Islanders, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Mathew Barzal scored with 1:25 left in regulation and the New York Islanders defeated the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Saturday. The forward found a rebound off a scrum in front of the net and lifted it over a sprawling Connor Ingram from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 6 Bulls earn CSC Academic All-District honors
item.description: The University of South Florida football program had six student-athletes earn recognition on the 2024 Academic All-District Football Team.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF Associate AD, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears interview Mike Vrabel for head coaching position; Iowa State's Matt Campbell also comes up, report says
item.description: The Bears interviewed former Tennessee Titans head coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job on Wednesday, which was not unexpected. But a name from the college ranks that has now come up, according to a Chicago Tribune report, certainly wasn't on the radar of NFL coaching carousel pundits.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
